prompt: A powerful and emotional surreal image of human lungs clearly shaped from an organic lung-like structure made of a modern city skyline, with buildings forming the exact lung structure. The left lung is bright, clean, and filled with soft sunlight and clear air, while the right lung is dark, heavily polluted with thick black smoke and toxic smog. The contrast between the two lungs is sharp and striking. Only a few small human figures are visible inside the polluted lung, coughing and struggling to breathe. The clean lung appears calm and healthy, while the polluted lung feels suffocating and dying. Minimal clutter, strong focus on the lung shape, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, realistic textures, no text, no labels, no charts, single frame, deeply emotional and symbolic.
insight: Air pollution is slowly destroying human lungs over time
